homepage.heroSubline: Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc delivers reliable heating and cooling solutions. Trust our experienced team for installations, repairs, and maintenance.
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of HVAC Expertise in Hampton Roads
aboutText: Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc began with a simple mission: provide honest, dependable HVAC services to our neighbors in Virginia Beach. Founded by a team of experienced technicians, we understood the unique challenges of our coastal climate – from stifling summer humidity to the corrosive effects of salt air. We built our business on a commitment to quality workmanship and lasting solutions.

Our approach is straightforward: diagnose the problem accurately, explain the options clearly, and execute the work efficiently. We believe in transparency and open communication every step of the way. We use only quality parts and proven techniques to ensure lasting performance and customer satisfaction. We aren't satisfied until you are.

We're proud to be a part of the Virginia Beach community. We actively support local initiatives and organizations, and we prioritize giving back to the area we call home. Your comfort is our business, and your trust is our greatest reward.

valueProps.title: Experienced Technicians
valueProps.description: Our team has years of experience handling all types of HVAC systems.

valueProps.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
valueProps.description: We're available around the clock to address urgent heating and cooling issues.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide upfront, honest pricing with no hidden fees.

valueProps.title: Quality Workmanship
valueProps.description: We use only the best parts and techniques to ensure lasting performance.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact us today for reliable HVAC services in Virginia Beach.

services.name: Air Conditioning Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable AC repair services to keep you cool and comfortable in the Virginia Beach heat.
services.description:
Don't let a broken air conditioner ruin your summer. Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc provides prompt and dependable AC repair services throughout Virginia Beach. We understand the urgency of restoring cool air during our hot, humid summers. Our experienced technicians are equipped to diagnose and repair all makes and models of air conditioners, from central AC units to ductless mini-splits.

We address common AC problems such as refrigerant leaks, compressor failures, faulty fans, and electrical issues. We use advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint the issue quickly and accurately. Our team will explain the problem clearly and provide you with the best repair options. We only use quality replacement parts to ensure lasting performance and reliability.

Living near the ocean exposes AC units to corrosive salt air. We take extra care to protect your equipment from the elements, extending its lifespan and preventing future problems. If your AC is making strange noises, blowing warm air, or not turning on at all, don't hesitate to call Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc for fast, reliable repair services.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the problem using advanced diagnostic tools.
Step 2: Explain the repair options and provide a transparent quote.
Step 3: Complete the repair efficiently using quality parts.
Step 4: Test the system to ensure optimal performance.
benefits: Faster cooling and improved energy efficiency
Extended lifespan of your AC unit
Peace of mind knowing your AC is in good hands

faq.question: How do I know if my AC needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include blowing warm air, making strange noises, leaking refrigerant, or not turning on at all. If you notice any of these issues, it's best to call a professional for an inspection.

faq.question: How long will it take to repair my AC?
faq.answer: The repair time depends on the complexity of the issue. We strive to complete most repairs quickly and efficiently, often within the same day.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency AC repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency AC repair services to address urgent cooling issues. We understand that AC problems can happen at any time, and we're here to help.

services.name: Air Conditioning Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert AC installation services for homes and businesses in Virginia Beach.
services.description:
Upgrading your air conditioning system can significantly improve your comfort and energy efficiency. Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc provides professional AC installation services for homes and businesses in Virginia Beach. We'll help you choose the right AC system for your needs and ensure a seamless installation process.

We start with a thorough assessment of your property to determine the appropriate size and type of AC unit. We consider factors such as square footage, insulation, window placement, and sun exposure. We offer a wide range of AC systems from leading brands, including central AC units, ductless mini-splits, and heat pumps. Our team will explain the pros and cons of each option to help you make an informed decision.

Our experienced technicians handle every aspect of the installation process, from removing the old unit to installing the new one. We ensure proper refrigerant levels, secure electrical connections, and optimal airflow. We also provide thorough testing and calibration to ensure your new AC system operates at peak performance. We're familiar with the unique challenges of installing AC systems in Virginia Beach homes, including older houses in the Oceanfront area and newer construction in Kempsville. We'll handle any obstacles with professionalism and expertise.
process: Step 1: Assess your property to determine the right AC system.
Step 2: Remove the old unit and prepare the installation site.
Step 3: Install the new AC unit and connect all components.
Step 4: Test and calibrate the system to ensure optimal performance.
benefits: Increased energy efficiency and lower energy bills

faq.question: How do I choose the right AC system for my home?
faq.answer: We'll assess your home's size, insulation, and other factors to recommend the best AC system for your needs. We'll also discuss your budget and preferences to help you make an informed decision.

faq.question: How long does AC installation take?
faq.answer: The installation time depends on the complexity of the project. Most installations can be completed in one to two days.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options for AC installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to make AC installation more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

services.name: Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Reliable heating repair services to keep your home warm during the Virginia Beach winter.
services.description:
When the winter chill hits Virginia Beach, a malfunctioning heating system can quickly make your home uncomfortable. Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc provides prompt and reliable heating repair services to restore warmth and comfort to your home. We service all types of heating systems, including furnaces, heat pumps, and boilers.

Our experienced technicians are trained to diagnose and repair a wide range of heating problems. We address common issues such as pilot light problems, faulty thermostats, blower motor failures, and gas leaks. We use advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint the source of the problem quickly and accurately. We'll explain the repair options clearly and provide you with an upfront quote.

We understand the importance of having a functioning heating system during the winter months. That's why we offer 24/7 emergency heating repair services. Whether your furnace breaks down in the middle of the night or your heat pump stops working on a weekend, we're here to help. We prioritize safety and efficiency in all our heating repairs. We use quality replacement parts and follow industry best practices to ensure lasting performance and reliability. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid costly heating repairs in the future.
process: Step 1: Diagnose the heating problem using advanced diagnostic tools.
Step 2: Explain the repair options and provide a transparent quote.
Step 3: Complete the repair efficiently using quality parts.
Step 4: Test the system to ensure proper heating and safety.
benefits: Restored warmth and comfort in your home
Reduced risk of carbon monoxide poisoning
Extended lifespan of your heating system

faq.question: How do I know if my heating system needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include unusual noises, inconsistent heating, or a complete system failure. If you notice any of these issues, it's best to call a professional for an inspection.

faq.question: What are the signs of a carbon monoxide leak?
faq.answer: Symptoms of carbon monoxide poisoning include headaches, dizziness, nausea, and confusion. If you suspect a carbon monoxide leak, evacuate your home immediately and call 911.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency heating repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency heating repair services to address urgent heating issues. We understand that heating problems can happen at any time, and we're here to help.

services.name: Duct Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Improve your indoor air quality with our professional duct cleaning services in Virginia Beach.
services.description:
Over time, dust, pollen, mold, and other contaminants can accumulate in your air ducts, impacting your indoor air quality and potentially triggering allergies or respiratory problems. Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc offers comprehensive duct cleaning services to remove these contaminants and improve the air you breathe in your Virginia Beach home or business.

Our experienced technicians use specialized equipment to thoroughly clean your air ducts. We start by inspecting your ductwork to identify any areas of concern, such as mold growth or rodent infestations. We then use powerful vacuums and brushes to dislodge and remove debris from the duct walls. We also clean your vents and registers to ensure optimal airflow.

We take extra care to protect your home during the duct cleaning process. We use drop cloths and plastic sheeting to prevent dust and debris from spreading. We also seal off vents and registers to minimize air leakage. Our duct cleaning services can help improve your indoor air quality, reduce allergy symptoms, and increase the efficiency of your HVAC system. We recommend duct cleaning every 3-5 years, or more frequently if you have pets, allergies, or respiratory problems. Living near the oceanfront, properties in Virginia Beach are more susceptible to mold growth; routine duct cleaning is a preventative measure.
process: Step 1: Inspect your ductwork to identify areas of concern.
Step 2: Seal off vents and registers to prevent air leakage.
Step 3: Use powerful vacuums and brushes to remove debris from the duct walls.
Step 4: Clean your vents and registers to ensure optimal airflow.

faq.question: How often should I have my air ducts cleaned?
faq.answer: We recommend duct cleaning every 3-5 years, or more frequently if you have pets, allergies, or respiratory problems.

faq.question: Can duct cleaning help with allergies?
faq.answer: Yes, duct cleaning can help reduce allergy symptoms by removing dust, pollen, and other allergens from your air ducts.

faq.question: Is duct cleaning messy?
faq.answer: We take precautions to protect your home during the duct cleaning process. We use drop cloths and plastic sheeting to prevent dust and debris from spreading.

services.name: Heat Pump Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive heat pump services for year-round comfort in Virginia Beach.
services.description:
Heat pumps are a popular choice for heating and cooling in Virginia Beach due to their energy efficiency and versatility. Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc offers a full range of heat pump services, including installation, repair, and maintenance. We're experienced in working with all types of heat pumps, including air-source, geothermal, and ductless mini-split systems.

Our heat pump installation services include a thorough assessment of your property to determine the appropriate size and type of unit. We consider factors such as square footage, insulation, and climate zone. We offer a wide range of heat pump systems from leading brands, and our team will explain the pros and cons of each option to help you make an informed decision.

Our heat pump repair services are available 24/7 to address urgent heating and cooling issues. We're trained to diagnose and repair a wide range of heat pump problems, such as refrigerant leaks, compressor failures, and defrost cycle issues. We use quality replacement parts and follow industry best practices to ensure lasting performance and reliability.

We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid costly heat pump repairs in the future. Our maintenance services include cleaning the coils, inspecting the refrigerant levels, and testing the electrical components.
process: Step 1: Assess your property to determine the right heat pump system.
Step 2: Install the new heat pump unit and connect all components.
Step 3: Diagnose and repair any heat pump issues.
Step 4: Provide preventative maintenance services to extend the lifespan of your heat pump.

faq.question: What are the benefits of a heat pump?
faq.answer: Heat pumps are energy-efficient, environmentally friendly, and can provide both heating and cooling. They're a great option for homes in mild climates like Virginia Beach.

faq.question: How long do heat pumps last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, heat pumps can last 15-20 years.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options for heat pump installation?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options to make heat pump installation more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Our AC went out on the hottest day of the summer! Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc came out quickly and fixed it within an hour. The technician was professional and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John B.
reviews.text: We recently had a new furnace installed by Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc. The installation process was smooth and efficient. The team was very knowledgeable and answered all of our questions. We're very happy with the new furnace.

reviews.name: Emily K.
reviews.text: I noticed a significant improvement in my indoor air quality after Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc cleaned my air ducts. I have allergies, and I've been breathing much easier since the cleaning. The technicians were thorough and professional.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: My heat pump stopped working during a cold snap. Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc came out promptly and fixed the problem quickly. I appreciate their fast and reliable service!

reviews.name: Jessica T.
reviews.text: We had Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc install a new AC unit in our home. The installation process was seamless, and the team was very professional. The AC is working great, and our home is much cooler now. The price was very competitive as well.

reviews.name: Michael S.
reviews.text: I've been using Mechanical Equipment Sales Inc for routine HVAC maintenance for years, and I'm always impressed with their service. They're reliable, professional, and always do a great job. Highly recommended for keeping your system in top shape!
